heading: Custody and release pending removal hearing
label: 1536 Custody and release pending removal hearing
notes: Abolition of Immigration and Naturalization Service and Transfer of FunctionsFor abolition of Immigration and Naturalization Service, transfer of functions, and treatment of related references, see note set out under .section 1551 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: take into custody any alien with respect to whom an application under has been filed; andsection 1533 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: retain such an alien in custody in accordance with the procedures authorized by this subchapter.

children.heading: Special rules for permanent resident aliens
children.label: 2 Special rules for permanent resident aliens
i
children.text: is a person lawfully admitted for permanent residence in the United States;

children.label: ii
children.text: if released upon such terms and conditions as the court may prescribe (including the posting of any monetary amount), is not likely to flee; and

children.label: iii
children.text: will not endanger national security, or the safety of any person or the community, if released.

children.heading: Information considered
children.label: B Information considered
children.text: The judge may consider classified information submitted in camera and ex parte in making a determination whether to release an alien pending the removal hearing.

children.heading: Release if order denied and no review sought
children.label: 3 Release if order denied and no review sought

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: Subject to subparagraph (B), if a judge of the removal court denies the order sought in an application filed pursuant to , and the Attorney General does not seek review of such denial, the alien shall be released from custody.section 1533 of this title

children.heading: Application of regular procedures
children.label: B Application of regular procedures
children.text: Subparagraph (A) shall not prevent the arrest and detention of the alien pursuant to subchapter II.

children.heading: Conditional release if order denied and review sought
children.label: b Conditional release if order denied and review sought
A
children.text: will reasonably assure the appearance of the alien at any future proceeding pursuant to this subchapter; and

children.label: B
children.text: will not endanger the safety of any other person or the community.

children.heading: No release for certain aliens
children.label: 2 No release for certain aliens
children.text: If the judge finds no such condition or combination of conditions, as described in paragraph (1), the alien shall remain in custody until the completion of any appeal authorized by this subchapter.
